title: Integrations
subtitle: Connect SequrAI with your tools and repositories.
githubSubtitle: Connect repos for automated production analysis on every push
loadRepositoriesHint: Load repositories authorized for this Workspace.
githubNotConnectedBody: GitHub is not connected to this Workspace.
migrationReconnectBody: This GitHub connection needs to be linked again for this Workspace.
githubNotConnected: GitHub is not connected to this Workspace.
connectionLoadFailed: Could not load GitHub connection status.
oauthStateInvalid: GitHub authorization could not be verified. Try connecting again.
oauthStateExpired: GitHub authorization expired. Try connecting again.
workspaceAccessDenied: You no longer have access to that Workspace.
webhookHealthSubtitle: Webhook and repository connection status for each connected project.
webhookHealthEmpty: Connect a repository to enable Continuous Reviews.
webhookHealthAllHealthy: All connected repositories are ready for Continuous Reviews.
webhookHealthSomeDegraded: {count} repositories need attention before Continuous Reviews can run reliably.
webhookHealthReconnect: Reconnect GitHub or reconnect the repository to restore Continuous Reviews.
